blended.narrative: Bromont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
